'''Dark Novatroopers''' were a variant of the [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]], deadly next-generation [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

They were programmed with expertise in boarding operations against enemy ships and as such were commonly used to board [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] starships. They remained in operation throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], unlike the standard dark trooper models. They were armed with heavily modified [[DLT-20A blaster rifle/Legends|DLT-20As]]. These battle droids were very heavily armored to enforce control of any rebel situation they encountered.
